channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US and Iran exchange new military strikes as ceasefire talks continue and Israel advances in southern Lebanon
item.description: The article reports on escalating tensions between the United States and Iran despite ongoing efforts to preserve a fragile ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz to international shipping. Iran’s ...

item.title: Supreme Court rulings could reshape U.S. midterm elections through voting and campaign finance cases
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court is playing a significant role in shaping the political landscape ahead of the upcoming midterm elections, with several major rulings and pending cases that could affect voting r...

item.title: Brazilian Socialite Roseli Vieira Dies Shortly After Cosmetic Procedure
item.description: Roseli Fernandes Vieira, a well-known socialite and influencer from Brazil, tragically passed away at the age of 48 on May 26, just a day after undergoing a cosmetic buttock enhancement procedure. Rep...

item.title: NDLEA intercepts military-grade ammunition and large drug consignments in Kaduna and other states
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) has recorded multiple major interceptions across Kaduna and several other states, including the seizure of 380 rounds of military-grade ammunition and ...

item.title: Sri Lankan Tamil Refugee Teen Killed in Chennai After Dispute Escalates Into Fatal Road Rage Incident
item.description: An 18-year-old Sri Lankan Tamil refugee named Yansi lost her life in a fatal road rage incident in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, during the early hours of May 30. According to police, the incident stemmed from...

item.title: 2027 elections: The dangerous ease of candidate imposition dressed as consensus
item.description: The Premium Times editorial scrutinizes the 2027 party primaries across Nigeria, highlighting how some governors and party leaders have manipulated the nomination process under the guise of consensus....

item.title: Solar-Powered Desalination Produces Drinking Water and Recovers Valuable Minerals
item.description: Researchers at the University of Rochester, led by Professor Chunlei Guo, have developed an innovative solar-powered desalination system that converts seawater into drinking water while recovering nea...

item.title: Middle-Belt Tigers Defeat Southern Sharks by Six Runs to Claim First Nigeria Super League Cricket Title
item.description: Middle-Belt Tigers emerged champions of the maiden Nigeria Super League cricket tournament after beating Southern Sharks by six runs in a closely contested final held at the TBS Oval in Lagos. The vic...

item.title: Shubham Kumar secures AIR 1 in JEE Advanced 2026 with 330/360 marks; over 56,800 candidates qualify
item.description: The Indian Institutes of Technology (IIT) entrance examination, JEE Advanced 2026, has announced its results with Shubham Kumar from the IIT Delhi zone securing All India Rank (AIR) 1. He achieved an ...

item.title: UK MPs to Debate NHS Single Patient Record Aiming to Improve Care Coordination
item.description: Plans to introduce a single patient record across the NHS in England will be discussed in Parliament for the first time on Monday. The system aims to integrate GP, hospital, and social care data, allo...

item.title: Nairobi Family Seeks Public Support to Settle KSh 690,000 Medical Bill for Recovering Daughter
item.description: A family in Nairobi has appealed to members of the public for financial assistance to help clear a hospital bill of KSh 690,000 for their daughter, Linet Chagusia, who has been undergoing treatment fo...

item.title: PNP to deploy over 55,000 personnel nationwide for Balik Eskwela 2026 school opening security
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) announced that more than 55,000 police personnel and force multipliers will be deployed across the country to ensure safety and security during the opening of clas...

item.title: Trump Steps In After Artists Withdraw From Freedom 250 Concert
item.description: As the United States approaches its 250th anniversary, the Freedom 250 concert series, planned as the 'Great American State Fair' on Washington D.C.’s National Mall, has faced major setbacks. Several ...

item.title: URC quarter-finals highlight home dominance and key challenges for South African sides
item.description: The United Rugby Championship quarter-finals produced a weekend full of dominant performances, clear tactical lessons, and a reminder of how crucial home advantage is in knockout rugby. Leinster and t...

item.title: Trump Mocks Carlson, Greene, Massie and Other Former Allies in AI-Generated Truth Social Post
item.description: President Donald Trump used Truth Social to share an AI-generated image mocking several prominent conservative figures who have recently criticized him or diverged from his positions. The image depict...

item.title: More than 25 PTI lawmakers absent from KP meeting amid reports of internal dissatisfaction
item.description: Signs of internal differences have surfaced within Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa after more than 25 lawmakers did not attend a key parliamentary party meeting held in Peshawar. ...

item.title: US and Iran exchange strikes amid ongoing ceasefire tensions and stalled negotiations
item.description: The United States reported that it carried out strikes on Iranian military installations over the weekend, marking a fresh escalation in the ongoing tensions between the two countries. According to US...

item.title: Iran Targets US Air Base After Weekend Strikes on Iranian Military Installations
item.description: The United States conducted strikes on Iranian military sites over the weekend, citing aggressive actions by Iran, including the downing of a US MQ-1 drone over international waters. In response, Iran...

item.title: UHN Gala Raises $2.3 Million to Support Research, Innovation and Patient Care in Toronto
item.description: The inaugural A Night Out for UHN gala, presented by Sprott Inc. and held at the Ritz-Carlton Toronto, raised $2.3 million in support of the University Health Network (UHN). The event brought together...

item.title: Sandiganbayan issues arrest warrant in plunder and graft cases against Jinggoy Estrada (live updates)
item.description: This news report covers live updates from the Sandiganbayan regarding the plunder and graft cases involving Senator Jinggoy Estrada. The anti-graft court has reportedly issued an arrest warrant in con...
